intro: As the engines roar and tyres squeal, brave drivers take on the challenge of Circuito de Jerez - Ángel Nieto in the iFormula League! In a thrilling HEAT 1, they race against the clock in pursuit of glory. Starting at 2023-10-01T15:00:17Z, come witness an adrenaline filled race to the finish line. Who will triumph in this epic showdown?
